team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Cabinet members and invitations
team.inviteSuccess: Invitation sent. Copy the link and share it.
team.acceptSuccess: You have been added to the cabinet.
team.signInToAccept: Sign in to accept this invitation.
team.migrationRequiredSteps: Open Supabase Dashboard → SQL Editor → New query. Copy the contents of scripts/team-migrations.sql from the repo, paste into the query, and click Run. After it completes, refresh this page — the invite form and members list will work.
team.migrationFileHint: File: scripts/team-migrations.sql (in the web app root in the repo).
